text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho is about to start, and Fuji Kiseki
is uncharacteristically antagonistic toward her
fellow racer, Mayano Top Gun. The audience gets
fired up by the sparks flying between them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But all this is just an act to add some "spice" to
the race, and Mayano Top Gun is simply playing
along with Fuji Kiseki.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The excitement in the racecourse reaches a
boiling point... Both of them step proudly onto
the turf and prepare to race.
